privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic Logic Model creation exercise based on a grant narrative created during task setup. The narrative source (FutureCoders Youth Pathway) is created programmatically in setup_task.sh and contains: $500,000 TechFoundation grant, 12 full-time staff members, City Library partnership, Python curriculum with bootcamps and hackathons, serving 200 high school students and training 50 certified instructors for 5,000 instructional hours, expecting improved math and logic scores and confidence gains leading to a diverse STEM workforce. Two key terms are problematic: '$500k' never appears (only '$500,000'), and '5000 hours' never appears (only '5,000 hours'). Files are created at /home/ga/Desktop/grant_narrative.txt, /home/ga/Diagrams/stem_logic_model.drawio, and /home/ga/Diagrams/stem_logic_model.pdf. Required diagram structure: 5 columns labeled Inputs, Activities, Outputs, Outcomes, Impact.
